hero.title: Modernize. Optimize.
hero.subtitle: We support public institutions and organizations in their digital transformation with innovative solutions tailored to the challenges of modern administrations.

services.title: Comprehensive Support
services.subtitle: From strategy to implementation, we support you at every step of your digital transformation

items.title: Strategy & Planning
items.description: Institutional strengthening through training, knowledge transfer, and development of digital strategies aligned with your objectives.
items.detailedDescription: We help institutions develop comprehensive digital transformation strategies that align with their mission and objectives. Our approach combines organizational assessment, stakeholder engagement, and roadmap development to ensure successful implementation.

items.title: Customs Scanners - Installation & Maintenance
items.description: Installation, configuration, and preventive and corrective maintenance of X-ray scanners for container and cargo inspection. 24/7 technical support and operator training.
items.detailedDescription: Complete lifecycle support for customs X-ray scanning equipment including Nuctech systems. We handle everything from initial installation and configuration to ongoing maintenance, operator training, and 24/7 technical support to ensure maximum uptime and inspection efficiency.

items.title: Capacity Development
items.description: Building sustainable organizational capacities to ensure autonomy and sustainability of your digital systems.
items.detailedDescription: We build lasting organizational capabilities through comprehensive training programs, knowledge transfer initiatives, and institutional strengthening activities. Our goal is to ensure your team can independently manage and evolve your digital systems.

items.title: Custom Digital Solutions
items.description: Design and development of digital platforms tailored to the specific needs of administrations and institutions.
items.detailedDescription: We design and develop custom digital platforms that address the unique requirements of public administrations. Our solutions are built using modern technologies, following best practices for security, scalability, and user experience.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence & Analytics
items.description: Leveraging AI and advanced analytics to optimize your risk management and decision-making processes.
items.detailedDescription: Harness the power of artificial intelligence and advanced analytics to transform your data into actionable insights. We implement AI-driven solutions for risk detection, predictive analytics, and intelligent automation to enhance decision-making and operational efficiency.

items.title: Infrastructure & Security
items.description: Implementation of secure and scalable cloud infrastructure to ensure continuity and protection of your services.
items.detailedDescription: Build robust and secure digital infrastructure that supports your operations and protects your data. We design and implement cloud-based solutions with enterprise-grade security, high availability, and disaster recovery capabilities.

products.title: Ready-to-Deploy Solutions
products.subtitle: Innovative digital platforms designed to meet the specific needs of modern administrations

items.name: TRADEVAL
items.description: Advanced analytical system for valuation and classification with national reference database and anomaly detection.

items.name: SSE
items.description: Monitoring solution based on GPS, RFID and mobile technologies to locate, monitor in real-time and secure cargo movements. The system alerts agents of any abnormal activity such as container door opening, unauthorized stops and route deviations.

items.name: NUCTECH
items.description: Installation, commissioning, and repair of Nuctech X-ray scanners for non-intrusive inspection of containers, vehicles, and cargo. Complete customs control solutions with operator training.

items.name: TRACK+
items.description: Maintenance, repair, and calibration of GPS, RFID beacons and tracking devices for container and cargo monitoring. Advanced diagnostics, component replacement, and performance testing.

about.title: Your Partner for Institutional Transformation
about.description1: ATECH Solutions is a company specializing in digital transformation of public institutions and administrations. We leverage innovation and digital transformation as pillars of our business model to modernize institutional processes.
about.description2: Our client-centric approach ensures that each solution is designed around your specific needs and value chain. We get involved from the inception of your projects to ensure their relevance and maximize your return on investment.
highlights: Innovation and digital transformation at the core of our expertise
Client-centric approach and early engagement in your projects
Optimized solutions offering the best value for money

contact.title: Partner with us to scale your digital transformation
contact.subtitle: We're here to answer your questions and help you find the best service(s) to meet your needs.

nextSteps.title: What happens next?
steps: We schedule a call at your convenience
We conduct a discovery and consulting meeting
